name: SheetRoot
description: Root controller for a side-anchored panel. Uses native <dialog> for top-layer rendering.
whenToUse: Side panels for navigation, filters, or detail views that slide in from an edge.
avoidWhen: Centered modal - use Dialog. Small inline overlay - use Popover.

side.description: Edge the panel slides in from.

parts.name: SheetTrigger
parts.description: Button that opens the parent Sheet.

parts.name: SheetContent
parts.description: Side-anchored content panel of a Sheet. Uses native <dialog> with showModal(). Requires aria-label or aria-labelledby.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have aria-label or aria-labelledby (enforced by ModalLabelProps type).

parts.name: SheetClose
parts.description: Button that closes the parent Sheet.
parts.whenToUse: Inside SheetContent, typically in the header or footer.

aria-label.description: Accessible label for the close button.

parts.name: SheetHeader
parts.description: Header section of a Sheet, typically contains title and description.

parts.name: SheetFooter
parts.description: Footer section of a Sheet, typically contains action buttons.

route.label: Sheet
route.description: Slide-in panel from any edge with focus trap
